corrections_needed.name: Zuienkerke
corrections_needed.explanation: mebosoft.be is a web hosting company. Municipal website is at mebosoft.be/zuienkerke_gemeente/ (subdirectory) but email is on zuienkerke.be which has Microsoft MX. Seed data fixed.

patterns_discovered: Belgian bilingual municipalities use French name for domain (Ukkel→uccle.be, Bergen→mons.be, Hoei→huy.be, Geldenaken→jodoigne.be) — name mismatch is expected
Brussels municipalities use .brussels TLD and abbreviations (sjtn.brussels, 1030.be postal codes)
NL: lv.nl = Leidschendam-Voorburg abbreviation, bernheze.org and montferland.info use non-.nl TLDs but are legitimate
NL: Tytsjerksteradiel uses Frisian abbreviation t-diel.nl
